meta.title: What we can learn about China's J-36 (from America's FB-22)
meta.description:
Go to https://ground.news/Sandboxx to stay fully informed on military developments around the world. Subscribe through my link right now for 40% off their Vantage Plan, which is what I use everyday.

– BREAK –

A now-defunct plan to field F-22 Raptor-based bombers, known as FB-22s, offers us some insight into what China hopes to accomplish with their new J-36 stealth aircraft that recently started testing.
